generated_oml:
instance CraneDigitalTwin : DTDFVocab:SystemUnderStudy [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane digital twin system for container transport simulation and research"
    DTDFVocab:hasEnvironment LabEnvironment
]

instance LabEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:contains PhysicalCrane, DigitalTwinComponents
]

instance PhysicalCrane : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Lab-scale gantry crane with frame, motors, swing angle encoder, anemometer, and Arduino controller"
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Encoder measuring hoist swinging dynamics for real-time trajectory validation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Environmental sensor capturing wind speed data for trajectory simulation adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorController : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "TMC4671-Eval motor driver with built-in monitoring for motor current/position data"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorStateDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoAggregator : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based system aggregating sensor data and interfacing with physical crane controller"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance MotorStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorController
]

instance AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoAggregator
]

instance SensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Structured storage of sensor measurements including swing angle and wind speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted, WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance MotorTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Cart/hoist position data used for trajectory generation and validation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLibMiddlewareEnabler
]

instance ValidationMetricsData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Distance metrics and threshold data used for trajectory validation comparisons"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationService
]

instance Fusion360CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "3D model of the crane for spatial representation in digital twin visualization"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DigitalTwinVisualizationEnabler
]

instance CraneKinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Mathematical model of crane motion (cart/hoist dynamics) implemented in Python"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGeneratorService
]

instance CraneSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Software replica of physical crane behavior for validation and trajectory simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationService
]

instance TimescaleDBSchema : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB schema for structured storage of time-series sensor and motor data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDBEnabler
]

instance ArcadiaCapellaModels : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Capella-based models for systems engineering education and digital twin evolution documentation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo EducationalInsightService
]

instance MQTTBrokerEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker facilitating real-time communication between physical system and digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, ValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDBEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database enabler for high-frequency sensor and motor data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataLoggingService, HistoricalAnalysisService
]

instance GrafanaVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization enabler providing real-time and historical data dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, FaultDetectionService
]

instance DockerContainerizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Docker containerization enabler for deploying database, broker, and dashboard services"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService, DataVisualizationService
]

instance GantryLibMiddlewareEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based gantrylib middleware encapsulating all digital twin services"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, SimulationService
]

instance DigitalTwinVisualizationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Visualization enabler for digital twin representation and educational insights"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService, EducationalInsightService
]

instance DataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous recording of crane state (motors, sensors) in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalAnalysisInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time and historical visualization via Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides CraneOperationVisualizationInsight
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Kinematics-based service computing optimal, swing-minimized paths"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Digital twin simulation service replicating physical crane behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance ValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time validation comparing executed trajectories with simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:provides OperationalValidationAlertAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Time-series classification service identifying anomalies in sensor/motor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Post-operation analysis service revealing trends in crane operation data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalAnalysisInsight
]

instance EducationalInsightService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service providing educational insights about digital twin evolution and systems engineering"
    DTDFVocab:provides EducationalInsight
]

instance CraneOperationVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of crane operations with trajectory traces and simulation bounds"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insights into optimal paths that minimize swinging motion and improve crane efficiency"
]

instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Identification of anomalies in sensor and motor data for predictive maintenance"
]

instance HistoricalAnalysisInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Post-operation analysis revealing trends in crane wear patterns and environmental impacts"
]

instance EducationalInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Educational insights demonstrating digital twin evolution patterns and systems engineering principles"
]

instance OperationalValidationAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Real-time alerts for trajectory deviations triggering manual adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance TrajectoryOptimizationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automated generation of optimal trajectories to improve crane efficiency"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance DigitalTwinComponents : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Collection of digital twin components including models, enablers, and services"
    base:isContainedIn LabEnvironment
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The virtual-to-physical interaction is unidirectional in this exemplar, as the digital twin primarily **observes and validates** rather than directly controlling the physical crane. However, it provides:
  - **Optimal trajectory generation** via the **Trajectory Generator Service**, which computes kinematically feasible paths for the crane’s motors (cart and hoist) to minimize residual swinging.
  - **Simulation outputs** from the **Simulation Service** (e.g., predicted trajectories, confidence bounds) displayed on the **Grafana dashboard** for operator review.
  - **Alerts** via the dashboard when continuous validation thresholds are breached, prompting manual intervention (e.g., recalibration). The digital twin does not autonomously adjust physical parameters but enables **semi-autonomous validation** of operator actions."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "The digital twin operates on a **real-time/near-real-time** time scale, with continuous data logging and validation. The **Logging Application** streams sensor data at unspecified intervals (implied to be high-frequency, e.g., ~10–100Hz for motor control), while the **Continuous Validation Service** performs periodic comparisons (frequency unspecified but tied to trajectory execution). The **Trajectory Generator** and **Simulation Service** operate on-demand for trajectory planning and validation, respectively. No explicit latency or synchronization frequency is documented beyond 'continuous' operations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The digital twin constellation is organized as a **service-oriented architecture** with the following components:
  1. **Physical Crane Interface**: Python module bridging the Arduino-based controller to the digital twin services.
  2. **Logging Application**: Continuously writes sensor/motor data to TimescaleDB via MQTT.
  3. **Trajectory Generator Service**: Computes optimal paths using the kinematic model and publishes them via MQTT.
  4. **Simulation Service**: Replicates physical behavior for validation, with outputs compared against real trajectories.
  5. **Continuous Validation Service**: Monitors distance metrics between real and simulated trajectories, triggering alerts via MQTT.
  6. **Dashboard (Grafana)**: Aggregates data from TimescaleDB and MQTT for visualization and operator interaction.
  All components communicate via **MQTT topics** and share a **central TimescaleDB** for data persistence. The system is deployed on a **single personal computer** with Docker managing the database, broker, and dashboard."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The digital twin covers the **as-operated** phase of the physical crane’s life cycle, focusing on **runtime monitoring, validation, and optimization** of operational performance. It does not model the **as-designed** (CAD) or **as-manufactured** phases explicitly, though CAD models (Fusion360) are included for reference. The twin’s primary role is **operational twinning**, enabling continuous validation and fault detection during crane operation."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Fidelity and validity are ensured through:
  - **Kinematic Model Accuracy**: The digital twin’s trajectory generator uses a **precise kinematic model** of the crane’s cart/hoist dynamics, validated against real-world data.
  - **Continuous Validation**: A **distance metric-based comparison** between executed and simulated trajectories, with configurable thresholds. Deviations trigger alerts via Grafana.
  - **Uncertainty Handling**: Simulation confidence bounds (upper/lower bounds) are displayed on the dashboard to quantify prediction errors.
  - **Verification**: The **Simulation Service** is validated against physical data in [5], and fault detection methods are evaluated in [6] using time-series classification.
  - **Validation**: Post-operation analysis of logged data (TimescaleDB) to cross-validate models with real-world performance. The twin does not include **uncertainty propagation** or **Bayesian calibration** mechanisms."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The digital twin connects to the physical system via:
  - **MQTT Protocol**: Eclipse Mosquitto broker enables asynchronous, lightweight communication between the **Arduino** (physical sensors) and digital twin services (e.g., Logging Application, Continuous Validation Service).
  - **Local Network**: All components (physical crane, PC, and digital twin services) are deployed on a **single personal computer**, eliminating external network dependencies.
  - **Python Interfaces**: The **Physical Crane Interface** and **Control Application** act as bridges between hardware and digital twin services, using MQTT for data exchange. No explicit mention of JSON payloads or latency metrics is provided beyond 'continuous' data streaming."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The digital twin is **locally hosted** on a **personal computer** with the following deployment details:
  - **Hardware**: Single host machine running the physical crane controller and digital twin services.
  - **Software Stack**:
    - **Database**: TimescaleDB (Docker container).
    - **Broker**: Eclipse Mosquitto (Docker container).
    - **Dashboard**: Grafana (Docker container).
    - **Services**: Python-based (gantrylib module) running natively on the host.
  - **Deployment Method**: Docker Compose for container orchestration, with automatic initialization of database schemas and dashboard configurations. The **gantrylib** module is installed via pip for Python-based services. No cloud or distributed hosting is used."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The digital twin adheres to the following standards and conventions:
  - **Data Standards**: Uses **TimescaleDB** (PostgreSQL-compatible) for time-series data, enabling SQL-based querying.
  - **Communication**: MQTT protocol (IETF standard) for inter-service communication.
  - **Modeling**: Kinematic models follow **standard robotics conventions** (e.g., forward/inverse kinematics for gantry cranes).
  - **No Formal Frameworks**: Avoids commercial digital twin frameworks (e.g., Eclipse Ditto, BaSyx) in favor of an **ad-hoc, modular approach** with open-source tools. The **CAD models** use Autodesk Fusion360, and **Arcadia models** follow Capella standards for systems engineering."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Security and safety considerations are implicitly addressed through:
  - **Local Deployment**: All components (physical crane and digital twin) operate on a **single personal computer**, minimizing exposure to external cyber threats.
  - **Operator Control**: The **Human Machine Interface (HMI)** provides direct oversight, allowing manual intervention if automated alerts indicate anomalies.
  - **Data Isolation**: The **TimescaleDB** and **MQTT Broker** are containerized, reducing cross-service vulnerabilities.
  - **No Remote Actuation**: The digital twin does not execute remote operations on the physical crane; all control decisions are advisory and require operator confirmation.
  The system lacks explicit security protocols (e.g., encryption, authentication) beyond the default security of local networks and open-source tools. Safety is ensured through **threshold-based validation** and **manual override capabilities**."
]
